title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Procter & Gamble India Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Procter & Gamble India Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
We at Procter & Gamble India Ventures Solutions are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Gurgaon. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Procter & Gamble India Ventures Solutions:
Procter & Gamble India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Procter & Gamble India Ventures Solutions!
